overall.description: A continuous drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city street (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a distinctive elevated structure wrapped in colorful LED lights on the right side. The camera moves forward along the center divider of a multi-lane road, passing under overhead signage and through an intersection, with various futuristic vehicles driving alongside.

events.description: passing under the large yellow overhead sign structure labeled 'SANTO DOMINGO'

dark futuristic coupe driving in the right lane alongside the LED structure

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying 'REAL WATER' advertisement with a person's face
large overhead gantry sign with 'SANTO DOMINGO' text supported by yellow industrial pillars
elongated elevated building wrapped in vibrant rainbow LED strips that change colors
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and digital signage
high-rise structures visible behind the LED-wrapped building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk avenue with a massive 'REAL WATER' billboard dominating the forward view. The camera drives steadily forward along the center divider, approaching and passing under a large overhead sign structure marked 'SANTO DOMINGO'. To the right, a distinctive building wrapped in colorful rainbow LEDs runs parallel to the road, while various futuristic vehicles drive in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial corridor with continuous LED installation

events.description: colorful LED structure shifts from rainbow pattern to purple-blue gradient lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the avenue, passing various futuristic vehicles in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sedan driving parallel to the camera in the right lane

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structure with purple and green facade at street level

segments.scene_description: Driving along the cyberpunk avenue with the colorful LED-wrapped structure now prominent on the right. The large billboard and overhead sign have passed out of view behind. The LED installation displays shifting rainbow patterns overhead. Various futuristic cars, including a distinctive yellow sedan, drive alongside. The left side features tall commercial buildings with digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with zebra crossing under overpass

events.description: approaching and entering the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk marking the intersection
continuing through the intersection as the road surface changes from yellow stripes back to asphalt

agents.ego_description: driving through the wide intersection, navigating across the yellow zebra crossing with other traffic

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection alongside the camera

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing marked with thick yellow stripes spanning the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a major intersection marked by a prominent yellow zebra crossing. The camera drives across the wide intersection, passing under overhead walkways and alongside a black van. The colorful LED structure continues to run along the right side, now displaying green and orange gradients. The avenue opens up ahead, revealing more of the futuristic cityscape with tall towers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a neon-lit cyberpunk avenue that transitions from a corridor of massive advertisements into a wide, open city intersection. It begins by gliding along a center divider toward a dominating REAL WATER billboard and a large SANTO DOMINGO overhead sign, while a building wrapped in rainbow LEDs tracks along the right. As these structures recede, the camera moves deeper into the district, passing tall commercial buildings with digital ads on the left and a yellow sedan among the futuristic traffic. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a major intersection, crossing a prominent yellow zebra crossing and passing under overhead walkways alongside a black van. Finally, the LED installation on the right transitions into green and orange gradients as the road opens up to reveal a sprawling cityscape of distant towers.
